panel.description: Forecasts based on your history and current pace: savings, spending, debt, goals, and financial health. Adjust scenarios to simulate the future without changing your data.

scenario.title: Simulate scenario
scenario.reduceExpensesHint: Simulate cuts to this month's expenses

simulation.title: Simulation
simulation.emptyHint: Adjust the controls to compare your current pace with a simulated scenario.

cashFlow.title: Cash flow
cashFlow.subtitle: History + 6-month projection
cashFlow.emptyDescription: Record transactions across several months to see trends and projections.

savingsChart.title: Projected cumulative savings
savingsChart.subtitle: 12 months at simulated pace
savingsChart.emptyDescription: A positive monthly surplus will generate a cumulative savings projection.

goals.title: Estimated goals
goals.subtitle: ETA at current pace
goals.emptyDescription: Create goals in the Goals tab to see when you could complete them.

debtChart.title: Balance projection
debtChart.subtitle: Debt snowball
debtChart.emptyDescription: Add debts to see how your balance decreases month by month.

insights.predict-savings-12m: If you keep this pace, you could accumulate ~{{amount}} in surplus over 12 months.
insights.predict-savings-6m: 6-month projection: ~{{amount}} in cumulative savings at the current pace.
insights.predict-debt-free: At your current pace, you would pay off your debts in approximately {{monthsToFree}} months.
insights.predict-debt-free-extra: With your extra payment, you could be debt-free in ~{{monthsToFree}} months ({{monthsSaved}} months sooner than minimum payments only).
insights.predict-health-up: Your financial health could improve toward «{{levelLabel}}» (score ~{{score}}) in the coming months.
insights.predict-health-down: If you continue like this, your financial health could drop to «{{levelLabel}}» (score ~{{score}}).
insights.predict-expense-over: At the current pace, you would close the month with projected spending of ~{{projected}} (exceeding your income).
insights.predict-month-end: Month-end projection: ~{{projected}} in surplus if you keep the pace ({{daysRemaining}} days remaining).
insights.predict-goals-behind: Goal «{{goalName}}» may not be reached on time at the current savings pace.
insights.predict-goal-eta: You could complete «{{goalName}}» in ~{{monthsToComplete}} months if you keep your savings pace.
insights.predict-cat: Your spending on {{categoryName}} could grow ~{{growthPercent}}% next month if the trend continues.
insights.predict-runway: Your monthly surplus could run out before month-end at the current spending pace.
